# LADDER Strength Training Plans · Fitness

Generated: Jul 22, 2026, 11:11 AM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jun 30, 2026 - Jul 20, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _ChristianaDH_, Jul 20, 2026, 4/5: "This app has honestly been life-changing. I’ve tried countless workout programs over the years, and nothing has kept me as consistent, motivated, and excited to work out as Ladder. The programming is incredible, the coaches are fantastic, and the voice-guided workouts make it so easy to stay focused without constantly looking at your phone. It’s one of the few subscriptions I’ve ever felt is worth every penny. There are only two issues I’ve run into, and I don’t think either is user error: 1. Exercise swaps and voiceover don’t stay in sync. If I swap an exercise, the video correctly changes to the new movement, but the audio coach continues giving instructions for the original exercise. For example, if I replace planks with bicycle crunches, the screen shows bicycle crunches while the coach is still explaining proper plank form. It’s not a dealbreaker, but the voiceover is one of Ladder’s best features, so I’d love to see it match the swapped exercise. 2. I can’t figure out how to cheer other members. I regularly receive cheers from teammates while I’m working out, and I even have a badge encouraging me to cheer others. However, after searching everywhere in the app, I still can’t find a way to send cheers myself. It feels like either the feature is hidden or there’s a bug. Even with those two issues, this is hands down the best fitness app I’ve ever used. It has completely changed the way I approach working out, and I highly recommend it."
            2. _DAHighton_, Jul 2, 2026, 4/5: "I thought I’d try this app after using others. It is good but, feels very Ai and does glitch a bit . It also definitely isn’t for beginners, I ended up with a really sore back from doing too much too soon ."
            3. _BexW7_, Jun 30, 2026, 5/5: "Keeps me on track. App can be glitchy at times but it’s kept me consistent."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      1 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jun 23, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Meem0284_, Jun 23, 2026, 1/5: "Great workouts but extremely disappointing customer service. I’ve been unable to use the app for six weeks now due to sciatica and asked if my annual membership could be paused or extended. The request was refused with no alternative offered and my follow-up email has gone unanswered for nearly two weeks. The lack of empathy and support has left a sour taste and I won't be renewing this membership again as I would have been better off with a monthly subscription which could have atleast been cancelled . What a shame !"
            2. _LaMama07_, Jul 18, 2026, 5/5: "For about a year and a half I paid for it expensive trainer and hardly saw any changes in my body or motivation. One month into the Ladder app and I’m now working out five days a week (compared to two with my trainer)for four weeks straight, seeing huge changes and improvements in my motivation and physique. I love that this app gives me what I need to be successful and make sure I’m living my best life."
